corrections.note: Verse number 10 missing as superscript before τί ἐστιν.
Verse number 12 missing before ἐγκατέλιπες; also § Γ Vaticanus-section marker in left margin of this line is not captured.
Word τε dropped between οἱ and υἱοὶ; the apparatus lemma 'οι τε]' confirms the body reading.
Manuscript siglum Γ (Venetus) mis-read as capital-I.
Siglum Q (Marchalianus, original hand) mis-read as Ω.

uncertain.note: 'ευρε Ι' — the siglum may actually be Γ (Venetus) rather than Ι.
'(-των A?)' — the superscript after A is small; may be A^a (alpha-hand corrector) rather than '?'.
'εχε Q**' — superscript may be Q^a* (a-hand + asterisk) rather than double asterisk.

notes: Swete's Vaticanus section-division markers (the capital Β at line 1, and § Γ at line 3) appear in the left margin; only Β was captured.
